title: extract_domain() in delivery.rs allocates a String used only as &str
description: delivery::extract_domain() returns String, but every call site immediately uses the result as &str (passed to is_private_host_resolved(&inbox_domain) and CircuitBreaker::record_failure/record_success/is_tripped(&inbox_domain)). The function could return Cow<'_, str> or the call sites could hold the String and borrow it, but as written the return type forces an allocation on every delivery loop iteration for a value that is never stored. Per standards: return borrowed types when the lifetime permits.
close_reason: Accepted: ponytail comment. Single String allocation dwarfed by HTTP request.
